summary: All 16 backend tests for Project Inception passed (100% success). Covered: health, JARVIS chat + history, stocks (quotes batch, intraday, quarterly, news, AI recommendation), document generation (PDF + PPTX with magic-byte validation), document CRUD (list/get/delete with 404 verification), default + persisted watchlist, and OpenAI TTS via Emergent gateway.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses Pydantic Literal for ChatMessage.role which is fine, but ChatMessage models are stored in mongo with default datetime; chat_history returns Mongo docs but datetime is preserved as native — works because motor serializes via FastAPI JSON encoder. OK.
Document file_b64 stored inside MongoDB — fine for MVP but may bloat collection; consider GridFS / object storage for production.
_av_cache is module-global in-memory — acceptable for free-tier rate-limit smoothing; will not survive restarts (intentional).
TTS endpoint passes through to Emergent gateway; in this run gateway responded successfully (test passed). Marked as known-limitation skip path if it ever fails.
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ (chat sessions, doc prompts, watchlist user ids). Generated documents are deleted at end of TestDocuments. Watchlist for 'local-user' is intentionally left set to ['AAPL','AMZN'] per the PUT test case in the review request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public base URL: https://inception-ai-gen.preview.emergentagent.com. Alpha Vantage live quotes were responding live during this run (is_live=true) but the suite tolerates is_live=false mock fallback. Document generation endpoints can take ~10-20s each due to Claude call; full suite runs ~95s. TTS via Emergent gateway worked here — if it fails in future, test_tts_basic uses pytest.skip on non-200 (per spec).
